items.title: JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
items.summary: Researchers introduce JoyAI-VL-Interaction, a novel framework enabling real-time, high-fidelity vision-language interaction for AI systems, achieving superior performance in complex multimodal tasks.

items.title: Android 17 Launches with New Multitasking Tools and Expanded Gemini Features
items.summary: Google's Android 17 introduces new multitasking capabilities and expands Gemini AI features, further integrating advanced AI into the mobile operating system.

items.title: Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories
items.summary: A new AI agent is proposed that can transform raw data into verifiable, multimodal stories, potentially automating aspects of data journalism and content creation.

items.title: Geometric Action Model for Robot Policy Learning
items.summary: A new Geometric Action Model is presented for robot policy learning, offering a more intuitive and efficient way for robots to understand and execute complex tasks.

items.title: DreamX-World 1.0: A General-Purpose Interactive World Model
items.summary: DreamX-World 1.0 is introduced as a general-purpose interactive world model, designed to enable AI agents to understand and interact with complex environments more effectively.

items.title: Predicting Model Behavior Before Release by Simulating Deployment
items.summary: OpenAI details a new method for predicting the behavior of AI models prior to their public release by simulating real-world deployment scenarios, enhancing safety and reliability.

items.title: FastContext: Training Efficient Repository Explorer for Coding Agents
items.summary: This paper details FastContext, a method for training efficient repository explorer models that significantly improve the ability of coding agents to navigate and understand large codebases.

items.title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
items.summary: VibeThinker-3B pushes the frontier of verifiable reasoning in small language models, demonstrating enhanced capabilities for accurate and auditable AI outputs.

items.title: Anthropic's Feud with Trump Admin May Boost Sales, Data Suggests
items.summary: Sales data indicates that Anthropic's recent conflict with the Trump administration might inadvertently be helping the AI company's market performance.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a viral billboard hiring campaign, aiming to scale its AI-powered customer interview platform.

items.title: VisualClaw: A Real-Time, Personalized Agent for the Physical World
items.summary: VisualClaw is presented as a real-time, personalized AI agent designed to interact with and understand the physical world, offering new possibilities for embodied AI.

items.title: TokenPilot: Cache-Efficient Context Management for LLM Agents
items.summary: TokenPilot introduces a cache-efficient context management system for LLM agents, significantly improving performance and reducing resource usage in multi-turn interactions.

items.title: Nemotron 3 Ultra: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
items.summary: Nemotron 3 Ultra is unveiled as an open and efficient hybrid Mamba-Transformer model, leveraging a Mixture-of-Experts architecture for advanced agentic reasoning capabilities.

items.title: Qwen-RobotWorld Technical Report: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation
items.summary: The Qwen-RobotWorld technical report details a new approach to unifying embodied world modeling by generating videos conditioned on language, enhancing robotic understanding and interaction.

items.title: A Company AI Flagged My Article As 'Low Quality.' I Ran the Numbers.
items.summary: A developer recounts their experience of having an article flagged as 'low quality' by a company's AI, prompting an investigation into the AI's assessment metrics.
